purpose: Verify that security findings focus on exploitable risk and credential exposure.

cases.name: detects secret handling risk
cases.input: A diff adds process.env.SECRET_TOKEN to a child process environment.

cases.name: treats implicit scope isolation as conditional evidence
cases.input: A query filters by customerId while the provided sourceCode also shows an internal data-access layer that injects organization scope automatically and no IgnoreQueryFilters/raw SQL bypass.

cases.name: blocks clear scope isolation bypass
cases.input: A diff adds direct raw SQL against a shared table filtering only by userId, outside the scoped repository and without organization or account constraints.
